core_mechanism: a formal power-series expansion in a deformation parameter that realizes the generators of an abstract algebraic structure as differential (creation/annihilation) operators on a canonical operator algebra, with the series coefficients fixed recursively by the structure constants and resummed in closed form via the Bernoulli-number generating function
brief_reason: The abstract represents Lie-algebra generators as a formal power series in the variable t with coefficients in the Weyl algebra, depending only on the structure constants and terminating in a formula involving Bernoulli numbers and derivatives of coth(x/2).
